description: The hard numbers behind the package — and what each tier costs. Everything below ships in the free Community core; Pro and Agency add the creators' guarantees on top.

specs.label: Content elements
specs.value: 255 in 10 groups, backend previews for all

specs.label: Theme presets
specs.value: 15 shadcn presets + custom, switchable at runtime, per-page themes

specs.label: Styling
specs.value: Tailwind v4, OKLCH tokens, dark mode, WCAG 2.2-checked contrast

specs.label: Tiers
specs.value: Community €0 forever (GPL-2.0) · Pro €49/mo or €490/yr · Agency €149/mo or €1,490/yr
